Lore Item No Trade
Slot: CHEST
AC: 48
STR: +10
SV POISON: +25
WT: 8.0 Size: TINY
Class: SHD ROG
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)
Poison Soaked Tunic
Lore Item No Trade
Slot: CHEST
AC: 48
STR: +10
SV POISON: +25
WT: 8.0 Size: TINY
Class: SHD ROG
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Item Type:Armor
Appearance:Velious Chain 2
Tint:
 
Color (RGB):20, 75, 20
Stackable:No
Submitted By:Sethric
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-07-27 10:02:32
Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

Expansion: Scars of Velious
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 55
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Temple of Veeshan
NPC Name
Ikatiar the Venom


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Temple of Veeshan


Uploaded November 20th, 2022 by halfridge
Send a correction
Post Comment
#REDACTED, Posted: Mar 07 2003 at 3:40 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post)
Not so fast...
QuoteReply
# Mar 07 2003 at 3:38 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593361216336
26 posts
My main is a 64 Rogue, I got this item yesterday on a guild raid. What did it replace?...Barbed Ringmail...yeah you heard me right Barbed Ringmail. Don't presume that a 64 Rogue would have better. I have been on COUNTLESS TOV/HOT raids and have ever only seen TWO SS Chain BPs drop! SOE needs to increase the drop rates on those SS armor pieces that are far too rare. Plate seems to drop like candy, and leather too.
Needless to say, this does not at all compare with the Rogue SS BP, but it was arguably an upgrade, and would have rotted had I not looted it. Had it also possessed 100hps like the uber cape that dropped, I probably not be so eager to upgrade from it.

DK
64 Assassin
▲ Page top
POS
QuoteReply
# Aug 22 2002 at 3:11 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591763215931
15 posts
This item is garbage. Any rogue or SK in a guild tough enough to go the NTOV will at least have a BP from PoG/Thurg. Yeah sure this has more AC than those but with no HP/Mana/Int I can't think of a Rogue or Sk that would wear this thing except for the rare fight where a high save poison is a must. Come on Verant this is NTOV put 100hp/100 mana on this thing !

Beric
▲ Page top

As of the latest patch, all Temple of Veeshan items that drop from the North and West wings have been upgraded...

48AC
10 Str 25svPois
Class = ROG SHD
Races = ALL

Nice Trak item
QuoteReply
# May 30 2001 at 10:41 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Since you can do trak above level 52 unlike the previous post said you can't this is a nice item for someone doing him true that in doing TOV you probably already own Trak a bit, the extra help can't hurt ya. I know i would use this on my next Trak run, since no other BP gives better.

Trakanon... by the time they get to ToV, they will own Trakanon with or without this tunic.

Hahaha, yes, uber split paw hide.. =)

__DEL__1591752351826
1 post
It's not going to help you make the poison, it's just going to show the world that you've _failed_ a bunch of times. After all, it's the "Poison Soaked" tunic... ; )

Venlar
16th Enchanter of E'ci
▲ Page top
RE: pretty nice for rogues
QuoteReply
# Aug 30 2001 at 11:23 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
When the person above said it will help young rogue's and there poison making, common sense will tell you that +25 poison resist helps you resist the asp and other mobs that poison when you're hunting them for exp, i.e. lvls 12-16, young rogues. Not +25 skill or whatever Einstein said. And for the record, I agree that it's another useless item at the lvl you can attain it.


Turn your back to me on Saryrn, and 2 mins later I'll be going thru your pockets.
